title: ListVolumesInput
description:
A JSON object that contains one or more of the following fields:

  • ListVolumesInput$Limit

  • ListVolumesInput$Marker

allOf.description: A string that indicates the position at which to begin the returned list of volumes. Obtain the marker from the response of a previous List iSCSI Volumes request.
Specifies that the list of volumes returned be limited to the specified number of items.
